title: Investments, insurance and super
description: Learn about deductions for investments, insurance, personal super contributions, foreign pensions and financial advice.
keywords: investment expenses, income protection insurance, personal super contributions, foreign pensions

child_links.title: Interest, dividend and other investment income deductions
child_links.description: Deductions you can claim for the costs of earning interest, share dividends, or income from other investments.

child_links.title: Income protection insurance
child_links.description: Deductions for the premiums you pay for insurance against the loss of your employment income.

child_links.title: Personal super contributions
child_links.description: Deductions you can claim for personal super contributions.

child_links.title: Undeducted purchase price of a foreign pension or annuity
child_links.description: Deductions from foreign pension or annuity income that has an undeducted purchase price.

child_links.title: Financial advice fees
child_links.description: Deductions you can claim for fees you pay to a financial adviser.
